name: Blueberry Pumpkin Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, and allspice.
2. In another bowl, mix pumpkin puree and evaporated milk until well blended.
3. Cream shortening and sugar in a large mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg to the mixture and beat until it is incorporated into the batter.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture alternately with the pumpkin mixture, beating well after each addition.
6. Gently mix blueberries and flour for the streusel topping.
7. Stir the mixed blueberries and flour gently into the batter.
8. Divide the batter evenly among 12 large paper-lined muffin cups, filling them about 3/4 full.
9. Sprinkle the streusel topping over the top of each muffin.
10. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
